description: Use this API to remove a participating period reserve unit from a specified OPF period reserve constraint. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_perrsv_gen(rsvid, eibus, genid)

parameters.name: rsvid
parameters.description: A valid period reserve identifier (1 through 15). (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: period reserve constraint does not exist.
machine does not have generator reserve data defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
